name: Chocolate Almond Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
Chocolate Almond Pound Cake
This recipe came from the echo in my early days on it. I didn't record who posted it.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Generously grease a 12-cup bundt pan and coat sides with almonds.
In a large bowl, beat sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each egg. Stir in chocolate and almond extract.
Combine flour, cornmeal, salt (if using) and baking powder. Alternately add with milk to the chocolate mixture, mixing at low speed until well blended. Spoon into pan.
Bake 50-60 minutes. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from pan and serving on a rack.
Serves 16
Ellen
